mentions.note: Spinoff from FedEx trades FDXF; Cramer sees potential winner due to long-term benign neglect under combined company structure
Just began regular trading after spin-off; CEO John Smith targeting 15% operating margin by 2029; autonomous truck testing 99.9% successful; keeping in charitable trust.
FedEx Freight spin-off terrific; can take out costs and be much more focused than consolidated structure. Kept in travel trust alongside FDX (rare dual holding). Structural advantage from separation.
